Bash(gh pr create --title "feat: dynamic story generation via live-loop AI pipeline" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- **Wizard** \(`StoryGeneratorWizard`\) creates the opening seed: premise → role mapping → 4-phase LLM generation \(roadmap → checkpoint → transitions → on_activate\)
- **Live-loop expansion**: when a transition fires to a stub checkpoint, `StoryOrchestrator` intercepts activation, calls `StoryGeneratorService.expandCheckpoint\(\)`, merges the result into the live story, then activates — story graph grows one beat ahead of the player at all times
- **4-phase pipeline** \(`StoryGeneratorService`\): separate `generateRaw` calls for roadmap, checkpoint core, transitions, and on_activate actions — focused prompts, no model confusion
- **Narrative roadmap** stored in `meta.roadmap`, updated after each expansion to reflect what actually happened and open new paths
- **Phase progress panel** \(`StoryExpansionPanel`\) in the drawer shows ⏳/✅ per phase, displays checkpoint name+objective \(read-only\) after phase 2 — non-blocking, auto-dismisses

## New files

- `src/services/StoryGeneratorService.ts` — core 4-call pipeline
- `src/components/studio/StoryGeneratorWizard/index.tsx` — 3-step seed wizard modal
- `src/components/drawer/StoryExpansionPanel/index.tsx` — phase progress panel

## Modified files

- `StoryOrchestrator.ts` — stub check + `expandStub\(\)` + `mergeExpansion\(\)` + `setExpandCallback\(\)`
- `story-schema.ts` — `_isStub`, `_stubName`, `isStubCheckpoint\(\)`, `makeStubCheckpoint\(\)`
- `story-library.ts` — `StoredStoryMeta`, `meta` field on `StoredStoryRecord`
- `storySessionStore.ts` — `expansion` state slice \(`isExpanding`, `phase`, `phaseDone`, `preview`\)
- `useStoryLibrary.ts` — meta-aware save
- `StoryContext.tsx` — merge callback wired via `orchestratorManager.setExpandCallback`
- `orchestratorManager.ts` — `setExpandCallback` export
- `settings/index.tsx` — ✨ Generate button
- `drawer/index.tsx` — `StoryExpansionPanel` rendered

## Test plan

- [ ] Settings → "✨ Generate" → wizard opens → enter premise → role mapping → phase progress → story saved + auto-selected
- [ ] Play chat → transition fires to stub → drawer shows phase-by-phase progress → checkpoint name appears after phase 2 → activates automatically
- [ ] Studio graph shows completed + active + stub destinations \(dimmed\)
- [ ] Roadmap updates after each expansion \(`meta.roadmap` in library record\)
- [ ] All 38 tests pass \(`turnController` failure is pre-existing, unrelated\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
